task_description: Create production-style DMS telemetry receiver architecture with versioned contract, WebSocket/Dummy/Replay receivers, validation, adapter to existing UI types, updated hook, Python PoC sender, and documentation. Dashboard must continue working in dummy mode without changes to visual layout.

verification.summary: Cannot run npm/tsc commands due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network (no node_modules) and sandbox Node.js proxy-bootstrap.js error. Python syntax validated OK. All TypeScript files manually reviewed for type correctness against existing codebase interfaces.
